channel.title: Tech Insights
channel.description: Daily curated news on AI, developer tools, and the tech industry

item.title: March 2026 AWS highlights
item.description: Hey dev community! 👋 Picking up right where we left off—here's the rest of the March 2026 AWS highlights. We're still riding the wave of agentic AI, faster inference, and those practical fixes...

item.title: Introduction to the Loki Stack: Lightweight Logging for Kubernetes
item.description: What is the Loki Stack? Loki Stack is a lightweight, cloud‑native logging system built with the same design philosophy as Prometheus. It’s a great fit for Kubernetes environments because it keeps...

item.title: uv on Windows with OneDrive: Centralized Virtual Environments
item.description: If you use uv on Windows and your projects live in OneDrive, you've probably already run into the problem: OneDrive tries to sync the .venv folder and everything breaks — slow sync, locked files,...

item.title: 测试文章1DEV.to专属
item.description: 测试文章1DEV.to专属这篇文章将只发布到DEV.to平台## 内容特点- 针对DEV.to社区的技术文章- 使用直接内容模式- 包含代码示例 javascriptconsole.log('Hello DEV.to!'); 适合开发者阅读的技术内容

item.title: Операционная система Linux
item.description: Введение Linux — это одна из самых популярных операционных систем в мире. Она широко используется на серверах, персональных компьютерах, мобильных устройствах и в облачных технологиях. Linux...

item.title: Three Responsibilities of a Global Application (Part 2)
item.description: In Part 1, I explained that at a global scale, trust is part of the architecture. Not trust as a feeling, but trust as something the system must enforce and prove. In this article, I aim to...

item.title: The Fatal Frontend Error of 2026: Why AI Will Replace You if You Only "Paint Buttons"
item.description: The Fatal Frontend Error of 2026: Why AI Will Replace You if You Only "Paint Buttons" The Frontend Developer, in the classical sense—a simple "mockup visualizer"—is rapidly going extinct. If your...

item.title: Beyond the Default: Building a Cost-Optimized Hybrid AWS Architecture
item.description: In the world of AWS, "default" settings are often the fastest way to an expensive monthly bill. Recently, a Senior DevOps Engineer dropped a strategic hint on one of my posts that challenged the...

item.title: Not Everything Needs MCP, Part 2: The 2026 Phase Transition — When Three Independent Roads Led to the Same Conclusion
item.description: The Ancient Past of Eighteen Months Ago — And What It Taught Us About the Future of AI Agents Let me tell you a story from the ancient past. By which I mean eighteen months ago. In the world of...

item.title: GHSA-WWG8-6FFR-H4Q2: GHSA-wwg8-6ffr-h4q2: Cross-Site Request Forgery in Admidio Role Management
item.description: GHSA-wwg8-6ffr-h4q2: Cross-Site Request Forgery in Admidio Role Management Vulnerability ID: GHSA-WWG8-6FFR-H4Q2 CVSS Score: 5.7 Published: 2026-03-16 Admidio versions 5.0.0 through 5.0.6 contain...

item.title: Picsart now allows creators to ‘hire’ AI assistants through agent marketplace
item.description: Picsart's AI agent marketplace will launch with four agents, then add more agents each week.

item.title: The Live Nation trial restarts with a ‘velvet hammer’
item.description: After a chaotic week following the Justice Department's mid-trial settlement with Live Nation-Ticketmaster, the antitrust trial picked back up surprisingly smoothly on Monday - this time, with...

item.title: Nvidia’s version of OpenClaw could solve its biggest problem: security
item.description: Nvidia announced an open enterprise AI agent platform, called NemoClaw, that is built off of viral OpenClaw.

item.title: The First Healthcare Robotics Dataset and Foundational Physical AI Models for Healthcare Robotics
DLSS 5 looks like a real-time generative AI filter for video games
item.description: Nvidia announced DLSS 5 on Monday during its GTC conference, and based on early reactions, it's going to be a divisive update, with some reactions calling it "slop" that unacceptably alters...

item.title: Teens sue Elon Musk’s xAI over Grok’s AI-generated CSAM
item.description: Three Tennessee teens are suing Elon Musk's xAI over claims that the company's Grok AI chatbot generated sexualized images and videos of themselves as minors, as reported earlier by The Washington...

item.title: Jensen Huang just put Nvidia’s Blackwell and Vera Rubin sales projections into the $1 trillion stratosphere
item.description: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang said he expects $1 trillion worth of orders for the chips.

item.title: Ecovacs’ Deebot X8 and X9 Pro Omni robovacs are nearly 50 percent off
item.description: If you like the idea of spring cleaning but not the part where you actually have to clean, both the Ecovacs Deebot X8 Pro Omni and newer X9 Pro Omni have dropped to their lowest prices to date...

item.title: Warren presses Pentagon over decision to grant xAI access to classified networks
item.description: Sen. Elizabeth Warren noted that Grok, xAI's controversial chatbot, has created harmful outputs for users and poses a potential national security risk.

item.title: Benjamin Netanyahu is struggling to prove he’s not an AI clone
item.description: Social media platforms are currently awash with conspiracy theories claiming that Benjamin Netanyahu has been killed or injured and replaced by AI-generated deepfakes. Between clips that...

item.title: Memories AI is building the visual memory layer for wearables and robotics
item.description: Memories.ai is building a large visual memory model that can index and retrieve video-recorded memories for physical AI.

item.title: Nvidia says China’s BYD and Geely will use its robotaxi platform
item.description: Nvidia added two leading Chinese automakers, BYD and Geely, to its robotaxi program, as the chipmaker seeks to put its stamp on the growing autonomous vehicle market worldwide. At its GTC...

item.title: I met Olaf — the Frozen robot who might be the future of Disney Parks
item.description: You know Olaf. Before KPop Demon Hunters, before the Wicked movies, it was Disney's Frozen that blasted show tunes like "Let It Go" and "Into the Unknown" into our lives. My little girls loved...

item.title: GlassWorm Attack Uses Stolen GitHub Tokens to Force-Push Malware Into Python Repos
item.description: The GlassWorm malware campaign is being used to fuel an ongoing attack that leverages the stolen GitHub tokens to inject malware into hundreds of Python repositories. "The attack targets Python...

item.title: Elon Musk’s xAI faces child porn lawsuit from minors Grok allegedly undressed
item.description: The three plaintiffs are seeking to represent anyone who had real images of them as a minor altered into sexual content by Grok.

item.title: Nvidia’s DLSS 5 uses generative AI to boost photorealism in video games, with ambitions beyond gaming
item.description: Nvidia’s new DLSS 5 uses generative AI and structured graphics data to make video games more realistic. CEO Jensen Huang says the approach could eventually spread to other industries.

item.title: Sony’s AI graphics upscaling for PS5 Pro games is getting a big update tonight
item.description: Sony's upgraded PlayStation Spectral Super Resolution (PSSR) technology is rolling out to several titles on the PS5 Pro, including Cyberpunk 2077, Final Fantasy VII Rebirth, Silent Hill 2, and...

item.title: How to watch Jensen Huang’s Nvidia GTC 2026 keynote — and what to expect
item.description: GTC is Nvidia's flagship annual event, where the chipmaker typically announces new products, partnerships, and its vision for the future of computing. Huang's keynote will focus on Nvidia's role...

item.title: Another deep tech chip startup becomes a unicorn: Frore hits $1.64B
item.description: At Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang's urging, Frore developed liquid-cooling tech for chips. That shift helped it raise $143 million.

item.title: Encyclopedia Britannica is suing OpenAI for allegedly ‘memorizing’ its content with ChatGPT
item.description: On Friday, Encyclopedia Britannica and dictionary publisher Merriam-Webster filed a lawsuit against OpenAI alleging that it used their copyrighted content to train its AI, then generated responses...
